name: CEL_ILLUSTRATIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.ILLUSTRATION_ID, T.ILLUSTRATION_NAME, B.ENABLED_FLAG, B.ILLUSTRATION, B.CONTENT_ID, B.ILLUSTRATION_URL, B.ILLUSTRATION_CODE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.DESCRIPTION FROM CEL_ILLUSTRATIONS_B B, CEL_ILLUSTRATIONS_TL T WHERE B.ILLUSTRATION_ID = T.ILLUSTRATION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
